Extensions.File:
# Memastikan folder Desktop Publik sudah ada $desktopPath = [System.IO.Path]::Combine($env:Public, "Desktop")
# Membuat file skrip pemicu CTT Tools di Desktop $shortcutFile = [System.IO.Path]::Combine($desktopPath, "Buka CTT Tools.bat")
# Isi perintah di dalam file .bat agar otomatis memanggil CTT Tools lewat PowerShell $batContent = "@echo off`nPowershell -Command `"iwr -useb https://christitus.com/win | iex`""
# Menyimpan file ke Desktop agar bisa di-klik kapan saja Set-Content -Path $shortcutFile -Value $batContent
